mapper.insert: INSERT INTO thesis_application(student_id, topic_id, team_id, apply_type, application_status, is_locked, apply_time, reserve_until) VALUES(#{studentId}, #{topicId}, #{teamId}, #{applyType}, #{applicationStatus}, #{isLocked}, #{applyTime}, #{reserveUntil})
mapper.select: SELECT ta.application_id, ta.student_id, ta.topic_id, ta.team_id, ta.apply_type, ta.application_status, ta.is_locked, ta.apply_time, ta.review_time, ta.reviewer_id, ta.remark FROM thesis_application ta JOIN topic_library tl ON ta.topic_id = tl.topic_id WHERE tl.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND ta.application_status = 1

SELECT ta.application_id, ta.student_id, ta.topic_id, ta.team_id, ta.apply_type, ta.application_status, ta.is_locked, ta.apply_time, ta.review_time, ta.reviewer_id, ta.remark FROM thesis_application ta JOIN topic_library tl ON ta.topic_id = tl.topic_id WHERE tl.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND ta.application_status != 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM thesis_application WHERE topic_id = #{topicId} AND application_status = 2
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM thesis_application WHERE topic_id = #{topicId} AND application_status = 1

SELECT application_id, student_id, topic_id, team_id, apply_type, application_status, is_locked, apply_time, review_time, reviewer_id, remark FROM thesis_application WHERE topic_id = #{topicId} AND application_status = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE thesis_application SET application_status = 0, remark = '每日00:00自动重置' WHERE application_status = 1 AND DATE(apply_time) < CURDATE()
mapper.select: SELECT application_id, student_id, topic_id, team_id, apply_type, application_status, is_locked, apply_time, review_time, reviewer_id, remark, reserve_until FROM thesis_application WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND application_status = #{status} LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM thesis_application WHERE topic_id = #{topicId} AND application_status IN (1, 2, 3)

SELECT application_id, student_id, topic_id, team_id, apply_type, application_status, is_locked, apply_time, review_time, reviewer_id, remark, reserve_until FROM thesis_application WHERE application_status = 1 AND reserve_until IS NOT NULL AND reserve_until < NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE thesis_application SET application_status = 0, remark = '预占30分钟超时自动释放' WHERE application_status = 1 AND reserve_until IS NOT NULL AND reserve_until < NOW()
UPDATE thesis_application SET student_id = #{newStudentId}, reserve_until = #{reserveUntil} WHERE team_id = #{teamId} AND student_id = -1 AND application_status = 1 LIMIT 1
